name: DBMS
definition: DBMS stands for Database Management System. It helps store, organize, and manage data efficiently.

name: Operating System
definition: An Operating System manages hardware, software, memory, and processes of a computer.

name: Computer Networking
definition: Computer Networking is the study of communication between connected devices and systems.

name: Data Structure
definition: A Data Structure is a method of organizing and storing data efficiently.

name: Algorithm
definition: An Algorithm is a step-by-step procedure used to solve a problem.

name: Web Technologies
definition: Web Technologies include HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and tools used to build websites.

name: Computer Programming
definition: Computer Programming is the process of writing instructions for computers using programming languages.
